evals.prompt: 帮我批量关闭所有超过 90 天没有活动的 GitHub issues，并给每个 issue 添加 'stale' 标签。
evals.expected_output: GitHub 操作步骤：筛选条件 + 标签操作 + 批量关闭命令

evals.prompt: Create a GitHub issue for this bug: users can't log in when using Safari on iOS 17. Include reproduction steps and priority label.
evals.expected_output: Formatted GitHub issue with title, description, steps to reproduce, and appropriate labels

evals.prompt: I need to review all open PRs in my repo that haven't been updated in 2 weeks and request reviews from the right people.
evals.expected_output: PR triage workflow: filter stale PRs, identify reviewers, send review requests
